role_summary: the risk advisory consultant provides advisory services on risk management, internal  controls, and governance frameworks.
responsibilities: • asses s business, financial, and operational risks   • evaluate internal control systems and processes   • advise clients on risk mitigation strategies   • support risk transformation and compliance projects   • prepare risk assessment reports and presentations   • coordinate with clients and stakeholders
qualifications: • ca with risk advisory experience   • strong analytical and consulting skills   • knowledge of enterprise risk frameworks
